name: Italian Vegetable Toss
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, place the sliced zucchini, yellow squash, mushrooms, melted margarine, snipped basil leaves, and cracked black pepper.
2. Cover with a sheet of wax paper.
3. Microwave on HIGH until the squash is crisp-tender, about 8 to 10 minutes, rotating halfway through cooking time.
4. Add the tomato wedges and sprinkle with shredded Parmesan cheese.
5. Continue microwaving on HIGH for an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Makes 4 servings.
